objective: Stand up Layer 4 operational knowledge and Layer 5 canonical artifact flow with explicit anchor, revision, and re-ingestion contracts.

workstreams.name: Layer 4 operational knowledge
outputs: decomposed artifact knowledge when canon exists

workstreams.name: Bottom-up canonical reprocessing
outputs: Layer 5 becomes the canonical source after promotion
meaningful canonical revisions trigger Layer 4 re-ingestion
Layer 3 support and summaries reconcile after canonical changes

exit_criteria: Artifacts have stable anchor and revision identity.
Layer 4 operational knowledge remains source-linked and revision-aware where applicable.
Canonical revisions can drive reprocessing back into Layer 4 and Layer 3.
risks: Allowing Layer 4 operational work to masquerade as canonical artifacts.
Failing to invalidate stale Layer 3 support after revision changes.
